criteria.label: Draw or narrate the nested AI → ML → (discriminative | generative) diagram and show where deep learning attaches.
criteria.example: Sketch AI containing ML; split ML into discriminative (fraud score) and generative (email draft); note both branches often use deep nets under the DL label.

criteria.label: Classify three real systems as Gen AI or discriminative ML with one-sentence justification each.
criteria.example: Spam filter → discriminative (label only); image diffusion tool → Gen AI (new pixels); star-rating regressor → discriminative (scalar score).

criteria.label: Explain predict vs generate without referencing transformer internals.
criteria.example: Discriminative: input email → output `phishing` label. Generative: input thread → output newly sampled reply text via repeated sampling from P(token|context).

criteria.label: Route a learning path: which linked topic covers LLM scaling vs model families vs self-supervised pretraining?
criteria.example: LLM scaling → llms-fundamentals; VAE/GAN/diffusion → generative-model-types; self-supervised paradigm → types-of-learning--self-supervised; stack context → ai-ml-dl-genai--deep-learning.
